betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Boiler§f

§aHeats fluids using an external heat source — essential for steam power and oil refining.§f

§6Crafting§f (at Tier 2 Anvil):
§b• Steel Ingot ×4§f
§b• Copper Plate ×16§f
§b• Insulator ×8§f

§6Setup§f:
Place a §bfirebox§f or similar heat source below, then the Boiler on top. Use a §bFluid ID§f (right-click on boiler with it) to select the fluid to heat.

§6Ports§f: 3 universal fluid duct ports (1 top, 2 sides).
§b• Input tank§f: 16,000 mB
§b• Output expands§f based on fluid heating
§b• Heat transfer§f: ΔT × 0.01 TU/t

§6Uses§f:
§b• Steam§f: Boil water → steam (power steam engines)
§b• Dense Steam§f: Upgrade steam density for turbines
§b• Oil Heating§f: Heat crude/cracked/desulfurized oil for the refinery

§cDanger§f: The boiler EXPLODES if the output tank overflows. Monitor fluid levels or use the Industrial Boiler (doesn't explode).

§eTip§f: Pair with a Firebox below and a Steam Engine above/adjacent for a complete power train. For oil, pipe the heated output directly into a Refinery.
